う～ん……やっぱり右上に５ミリほどズレてしまいますね……。<br>わたし、引き金:
Hmm... as I thought, off to the upper right by about five millimeters...
I wonder if I've got a strange habit when I pull the trigger.
あ、ご主人様。<br>最近、この子の機嫌がちょっと悪くて……: Ah, Master. Lately, this little one has been a bit out of sorts...
この子って、この銃のことですよ？<br>ここ最近、狩猟に使う機会が増えちゃって働:
By 'this little one,' I mean this gun. I've been using it a lot for hunting
lately, so maybe I've overworked it.
きっと、バレルに熱がこもって、わずかに膨張してしまったせいで、<br>狙いがズレ:
I think heat built up in the barrel, making it expand a bit, and that
threw off the aim... I'm sorry, little one, this is all my fault...
このくらいのズレなら、照準器の調整だけで、なんとかなるかもです。<br>この子は:
A deviation this small can be fixed with a sight adjustment. This little
one's my partner. She's got to keep working with me for a long time.
